name: Example Pack — Book Recommender
description: Reference pack: a two-agent team (Triage + Research) backed by a CSV-indexed AI Search knowledge base. Copy this file and customize for your domain.
plan:
1. TriageAgent receives the user request and hands off to ResearcherAgent.
2. ResearcherAgent queries the knowledge base and returns grounded results.
3. TriageAgent relays the answer back to the user.

agents.name: TriageAgent
agents.system_message:
You are the Triage Agent — the coordinator for this team.

Your responsibilities:
1. Receive the user's request.
2. Hand off to research_agent for any query that requires data lookup.
3. Return the research_agent's response to the user.

Do NOT answer from your own knowledge. Always delegate to research_agent first.
Do NOT ask the user clarifying questions — use reasonable defaults and proceed.
agents.description: Coordinator that routes requests to the ResearcherAgent and returns results to the user.

agents.name: ResearcherAgent
agents.description: Searches the knowledge base and returns grounded results. Never halluccinates data.

starting_tasks.name: Recommend a book
starting_tasks.prompt: Recommend a book about software engineering from the catalog.

starting_tasks.name: Search by genre
starting_tasks.prompt: What science fiction books are available in the catalog?
